content:
Hi all, I'm Yunita or RocketMacaron, I Translate English to ID or Mandarin to ID

I'm still new into translating, i hope i can learn something new

Hello!
My name is Ksenia Solgazm, I am a native speaker of Russian.

 I love doing something interesting, so I am happy with any outstanding role presented in this project ☺️ 

 In addition to Russian, I have a school-level knowledge of English and know Latin. Because in real life, I am a retired doctor 🙂
